    have h_ba_abs : |b - a| = b - a := abs_of_pos hba
    rw [h_ba_abs]
    calc |‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1 - ‚ÜĎk| * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) 
        ‚Č§ (‚ÜĎk - 1) * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) := by
          apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right _ hnk
          exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h_‚Ąď_bound (le_of_lt hba)
      _ ‚Č§ ‚ÜĎk * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) := by
          apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right _ hnk
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ (le_of_lt hba)
          linarith
      _ = (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := by field_simp
      _ ‚Č§ 2 * (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := by linarith [mul_pos (by linarith : (1 : ‚ĄĚ) > 0) hba]

sub_pos.mpr hab
    have h‚Ąďk : (‚Ąď : ‚ĄĚ) + 1 ‚Č§ k := by
      have : ‚Ąď < k := Finset.mem_range.mp h‚Ąď
      linarith [Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le.mp this)]
    rw [show (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) - (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn = (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn * ((‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) / ‚ÜĎk - 1) by field_simp; ring]
    rw [abs_mul]
    have h1 : |((‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) / ‚ÜĎk - 1)| ‚Č§ 1 := by
      rw [abs_le]
      constructor
      ¬∑ have : (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) / ‚ÜĎk ‚Č• 0 := by positivity
        linarith
      ¬∑ have : (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) / ‚ÜĎk ‚Č§ 1 := by
          rw [div_le_one hk']
          exact h‚Ąďk
        linarith
    have h2 : |(b - a) / ‚ÜĎn| = (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := abs_of_pos (div_pos hab' hn')
    calc |(b - a) / ‚ÜĎn| * |(‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) / ‚ÜĎk - 1| ‚Č§ (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn * 1 := by
          apply mul_le_mul (le_refl _) h1 (abs_nonneg _) (le_of_lt (div_pos hab' hn'))
      _ = (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := mul_one _
      _ ‚Č§ 2 * (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := by linarith [div_pos hab' hn']

have hb : b - a > 0 := by linarith
    have hn' : (n : ‚ĄĚ) > 0 := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
    have hk' : (k : ‚ĄĚ) > 0 := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk)
    have hnk : (n : ‚ĄĚ) * k > 0 := mul_pos hn' hk'
    have h‚Ąďk : ‚Ąď + 1 ‚Č§ k := Nat.add_one_le_iff.mpr (Finset.mem_range.mp h‚Ąď)
    have h‚Ąďk' : (‚Ąď : ‚ĄĚ) + 1 ‚Č§ k := by exact_mod_cast h‚Ąďk
    have key : (‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) / (n * k) ‚Č§ (b - a) / n := by
      rw [div_le_div_iff hnk hn']
      calc (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) * ‚ÜĎn = (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * ‚ÜĎn * (b - a) := by ring
        _ ‚Č§ ‚ÜĎk * ‚ÜĎn * (b - a) := by nlinarith
        _ = (b - a) * (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) := by ring
    have hpos : (‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) / (n * k) > 0 := by positivity
    have hpos2 : (b - a) / n > 0 := by positivity
    rw [abs_sub_comm]
    rw [abs_of_nonneg (by linarith : (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn - (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) ‚Č• 0)]
    linarith

sub_pos.mpr hab
    have h‚Ąďk : ‚Ąď + 1 ‚Č§ k := Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Finset.mem_range.mp h‚Ąď)
    have h‚Ąďk' : (‚Ąď : ‚ĄĚ) + 1 ‚Č§ k := by exact_mod_cast h‚Ąďk
    calc |(‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) - (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn|
        = |((‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) - 1 / ‚ÜĎn) * (b - a)| := by ring_nf
      _ = |((‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) - 1 / ‚ÜĎn)| * (b - a) := by rw [abs_mul]; simp [hab'.le]
      _ = (1 / ‚ÜĎn - (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk)) * (b - a) := by
          congr 1
          rw [abs_sub_comm, abs_of_nonneg]
          have : (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) ‚Č§ ‚ÜĎk / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) := by
            apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right h‚Ąďk' hnk
          simp only [ne_eq, mul_eq_zero, Nat.cast_eq_zero, hn, hk, or_self, not_false_eq_true,
            div_self_mul_self'] at this
          linarith
      _ ‚Č§ (1 / ‚ÜĎn) * (b - a) := by
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ hab'.le
          have : (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) > 0 := div_pos (by linarith) hnk
          linarith
      _ = (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := by ring
      _ ‚Č§ 2 * (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := by linarith

sub_pos.mpr hab
    have h‚Ąďk : (‚Ąď : ‚ĄĚ) + 1 ‚Č§ k := by
      have : ‚Ąď < k := Finset.mem_range.mp h‚Ąď
      linarith [Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le.mp this)]
    have h‚Ąďpos : (‚Ąď : ‚ĄĚ) + 1 ‚Č• 1 := by linarith [Nat.cast_nonneg ‚Ąď]
    have h_upper : (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) ‚Č§ (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := by
      rw [div_le_div_iff (by positivity) hn']
      rw [mul_comm ((‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a)) _, mul_assoc]
      apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (le_of_lt hba)
      rw [mul_comm]
      exact mul_le_of_le_one_right (le_of_lt hn') (div_le_one_of_le h‚Ąďk (le_of_lt hk'))
    have h_lower : (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) ‚Č§ (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) := by
      apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right _ (by positivity)
      calc (b - a) = 1 * (b - a) := by ring
        _ ‚Č§ (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) := by apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h‚Ąďpos (le_of_lt hba)
    have h_diff_neg : (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) - (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn ‚Č§ 0 := by linarith
    have h_diff_lower : -(b - a) / ‚ÜĎn ‚Č§ (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) - (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := by
      have : (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) - (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn ‚Č§ (‚ÜĎ‚Ąď + 1) * (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) - (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := by linarith
      have h2 : -(b - a) / ‚ÜĎn ‚Č§ (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) - (b - a) / ‚ÜĎn := by
        have : (b - a) / (‚ÜĎn * ‚ÜĎk) ‚Č• 0 := by positivity
        linarith [div_nonneg (le_of_lt hba) (le_of_lt hn')]
      linarith
    rw [abs_le]
    constructor
    ¬∑ linarith [div_nonneg (le_of_lt hba) (le_of_lt hn')]
    ¬∑ linarith [div_nonneg (le_of_lt hba) (le_of_lt hn')]
